Compliance.description: SABS/NRCS/SANS approved products, HACCP food safe, ITC cleared staff, eco-certified. No regulatory complaints found for cleaning industry.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Positive site testimonials; 342 Google reviews mentioned (rating unavailable); HelloPeter mixed with 5-star and 1-star reviews.

Product Value.description: Fair pricing no hidden costs claimed; broad service range for home/commercial; good value via guarantees and quick service.

Innovation.description: No app, online quote form only. Traditional services with industrial equipment. No notable tech innovation.

Customer Support.description: Email (info@clickcleaning.co.za), callback form, WhatsApp implied, Mon-Fri 8am-6pm, Sat appt. Excellent service claimed.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website form for quotes; no POPIA mention or security details found. Basic digital access.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Quote-based; upholstery from R165/seat; industry avg R80-300/hr ZAR

socialSentiment.summary: Limited data; positive on own site, mixed HelloPeter (5-star happy, some complaints), no recent X posts.
